ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载插件：Better Command Palette

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Close the palette when there is no text and backspace is pressed
ast.target: 当没有文本且按下退格键时关闭调色板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the plugin name in the command palette
ast.target: 在命令调色板中显示插件名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For those users who have use a "Hyper Key", enabling this maps the icons "⌥ ^ ⌘ ⇧" to the caps lock icon "⇪"
ast.target: 对于使用“超级键”的用户，启用此选项会将图标“⌥ ^ ⌘ ⇧”映射到大写锁定图标“⇪”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default cmd/ctrl is used to create files and shift is used to open in new tab. This setting reverses that to mimic the behavior of the standard quick switcher.
ast.target: 默认情况下，cmd/ctrl 用于创建文件，shift 用于在新标签页中打开。此设置会反转该行为，以模仿标准快速切换器的行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, only notes names will be displayed in Quick Switcher mode instead of their full path.
ast.target: 如果启用，在快速切换器模式下将只显示笔记名称，而不是其完整路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, Markdown notes will be displayed without their .md extension in Quick Switcher mode
ast.target: 如果启用，在快速切换器模式下，Markdown 笔记将不显示其 .md 扩展名

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A comma separated list of file extensions (ex: "pdf,jpg,png") that should not be shown when searching files.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的文件扩展名列表（例如：“pdf,jpg,png”），在搜索文件时不应显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix used to tell the palette you want to search files
ast.target: 用于告诉调色板您要搜索文件的前缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix used to tell the palette you want to search tags
ast.target: 用于告诉调色板您要搜索标签的前缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The hotkey used to switch to command search while using the command palette.
ast.target: 在使用命令调色板时，用于切换到命令搜索的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The hotkey used to switch to file search while using the command palette.
ast.target: 在使用命令调色板时，用于切换到文件搜索的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The hotkey used to switch to tag search while using the command palette.
ast.target: 在使用命令调色板时，用于切换到标签搜索的快捷键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows autodetecting of hotkey modifier or forcing to Mac or Windows
ast.target: 允许自动检测快捷键修饰键或强制使用 Mac 或 Windows 风格

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new grouping of commands that can be run together
ast.target: 创建一个可以一起运行的命令新分组

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最近使用项在固定项之上

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Caps Lock Hyper Key Hotkey Override
ast.target: 大写锁定超级键快捷键覆盖

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use shift to create files and cmd/CTRL to open in new tab
ast.target: 使用 shift 创建文件，使用 cmd/CTRL 在新标签页中打开

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open better command palette: File Search
ast.target: 打开 Better Command Palette：文件搜索

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open better command palette: Tag Search
ast.target: 打开 Better Command Palette：标签搜索

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add a new Command to the macro
